summary: Verified all 4 features on the contact detail page: (1) Automation Edit Modal opens when clicking Birthday chip with 'Edit Birthday' title, date input showing '05/31/1976', Clear Date and Save Date buttons. (2) Anniversary and Sold Date chips also clickable and open respective edit modals. (3) Hero Add Tag Button (+) next to tag pills opens 'Select Tag' modal with search and available tags. (4) Tag picker shows available tags (Follow Up, Hot Lead, New Customer, Out of State, Service Due, VIP) with add buttons.

accessibility_issues.issue: data-testid attributes are in the code but not rendering in the DOM for React Native Web
accessibility_issues.details: React Native Web requires testID prop or babel configuration to translate data-testid to DOM attributes. Found 0 elements with data-testid in DOM despite being present in source code.
accessibility_issues.impact: Only affects automated testing, not functionality

automation_edit_modal_birthday.chip_visible: PASS - Birthday chip shows 'May 31' with pink gift icon in AUTOMATIONS section
automation_edit_modal_birthday.chip_clickable: PASS - Clicking Birthday chip opens modal
automation_edit_modal_birthday.clear_date_button: PASS - 'Clear Date' button visible with red text
automation_edit_modal_birthday.save_date_button: PASS - 'Save Date' button visible with pink background

automation_edit_modal_anniversary.chip_visible: PASS - Anniversary chip shows 'Nov 6' with red heart icon
automation_edit_modal_anniversary.chip_clickable: PASS - Opens 'Edit Anniversary' modal when clicked

automation_edit_modal_sold_date.chip_visible: PASS - Sold Date chip shows 'May 9' with green car icon
automation_edit_modal_sold_date.chip_clickable: PASS - Opens 'Edit Sold Date' modal when clicked

hero_add_tag_button.button_visible: PASS - Blue '+' button visible next to tag pills in hero section
hero_add_tag_button.button_clickable: PASS - Clicking opens tag picker modal
hero_add_tag_button.available_tags: PASS - Shows tags: Follow Up, Hot Lead, New Customer, Out of State, Service Due, VIP
hero_add_tag_button.add_buttons: PASS - Each tag has a green '+' button to add

verified_features.automation_chip_edit: Birthday, Anniversary, Sold Date chips in AUTOMATIONS section are TouchableOpacity elements that open Edit modal on tap
verified_features.automation_edit_modal: Modal contains title, current date display, date input, Clear Date button, Save Date button
verified_features.hero_add_tag: Blue '+' button in hero section opens 'Select Tag' modal for immediate tag addition

action_items: OPTIONAL: Configure React Native Web to translate data-testid or testID props to DOM data-testid attributes for better automated testing support
critical_code_review_comments: The data-testid attributes are correctly added in the JSX code (e.g., line 1360: data-testid='auto-birthday') but React Native Web does not translate these to DOM attributes automatically. Consider using testID prop or adding babel-plugin-transform-react-native-web-testid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 automation/tag features verified working: (1) Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date chips in AUTOMATIONS strip are clickable TouchableOpacity elements that open Edit modals with date input, Clear Date, and Save Date buttons. (2) Hero section has a blue '+' button next to tags that opens 'Select Tag' modal. NOTE: data-testid attributes are in the source code but don't render to DOM due to React Native Web limitation - use coordinate-based clicking or text selectors for automated testing.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Personal SMS flow opens native SMS app instead of sending via Twilio
